text.title: Microservices Observability Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for shipping observability on a new service.

step.name: install-otel-sdk
step.action: Add OpenTelemetry SDK + auto-instrumentation (e.g. opentelemetry-javaagent.jar, @opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node, opentelemetry-instrument for Python). Configure OTLP exporter pointing at backend.

step.name: wire-structured-logging
step.action: Switch logger output to JSON. Add OTel context propagator that injects trace_id + span_id into every log line.

step.name: expose-red-metrics
step.action: Expose Prometheus endpoint (/metrics) with: http_requests_total (rate), http_request_errors_total (errors), http_request_duration_seconds (histogram).
step.decision-gate: If histogram bucket count > 30, STOP and reduce.

step.name: configure-propagator
step.action: Set OTel propagator = `tracecontext,baggage` (W3C). Remove custom X-Trace-Id wrappers. Verify caller + downstream traces stitch in backend.

step.name: redact-pii-and-document
step.action: Configure span processor / log filter to redact email, phone, IP. Document SLO targets + alert rules.
